assertions: A first execution is labeled as a baseline and makes no week-over-week movement claims.
Every AI finding, pattern, and opportunity cites only supplied Pinterest pin IDs.
Google Sheets receives sortable date-time and numeric rank fields with compact pin and image links.
A same-day retry upserts by Snapshot key instead of adding duplicate evidence rows.
Notion receives actual headings for research criteria, summary, observations, patterns, opportunities, source pins, and methodology.
The durable snapshot is committed only after Google Sheets and Notion both succeed.
